$comment: VerseKit plugin registry. Each plugin is published as a zip (PluginName/PluginName.dll + deps) on a 'plugins-v*' GitHub release. The app reads this from the raw URL on the default branch.

plugins.name: Resource Manager
plugins.description: View, create, and update web resources in your Dynamics 365 environment.
plugins.author: VerseKit

plugins.name: Table Browser
plugins.description: Browse tables (entities) and their columns (attributes) — read only.
plugins.author: VerseKit

plugins.name: Security Roles
plugins.description: Browse security roles and see which users and teams are assigned to each — read only.
plugins.author: VerseKit

plugins.name: Access Checker
plugins.description: See a user's effective table privileges across all their roles and teams — read only.
plugins.author: VerseKit

plugins.name: Solution Explorer
plugins.description: Browse solutions, see their components, and export managed/unmanaged to disk.
plugins.author: VerseKit
